prompt: A user just said: 'ingest /tmp/knowledge-test/TestLarge/raw/articles/新文章.md' Follow the ingest skill to process this material into the TestLarge wiki. Save step-by-step log to transcript.md and final report to report.md.
assertions: The agent read the raw article file
The agent created at least one new wiki page in TestLarge/wiki/
The agent moved the raw file to TestLarge/raw/archive/
The agent checked qmd collection existence (qmd collection list)
The agent ran qmd update after creating wiki pages
The report mentions qmd index update
